subcodes.title: Words spoken at Ritz Hotel in Budapest, 1913-04-09
subcodes.first_line: I hope that we shall all be confirmed to serve the world of humanity, because no service is greater today than promoting the oneness of mankind
subcodes.first_line_orig: امید واریم کل بخدمت عالم انسانی موفق شویم زیرا امروز خدمتی اعظم از تروج وحدت
subcodes.subjects: @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God
